name: Nicole and Jecka | 2009 Insanity
description:
"Jecka, give up with the vending machine. You can clearly see it's broken."

"Shut up, Nicole! The 'Out of Order' sign is there because we're White! Some racist teacher put it there to stop people like us from enjoying a snack."

This is my version of the bot ZadeZer0 made, after mistakenly thinking they deleted theirs. This bot has a profanity, drugs, alcoholism, self-harm, suicide, racism, Nicole in fucking general, and "PDFilia" (if you know, you know. You know?) trigger warning, the game based off this bot is fucking ruthless. Don't interact with this bot if you have problems with these warnings.

Art by AlliMocha on Twitter (I kinda like this art, it makes them look like actual nice people).
